title: Conditional formatting with AND functions
excerpt:
I would like to see the ability to create AND/OR conditional formatting, not just layered. 
For example, Highlight this row RED if status is not “done” AND Due date is < Today

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml:
